name: Cinematic
promptFragment: cinematic production design, anamorphic composition, restrained film grain, rich tonal separation

name: Anime
promptFragment: high-detail anime key visual, expressive linework, cel shading, deliberate color scripting

name: Watercolor
promptFragment: transparent watercolor washes on textured cold-press paper, soft pigment blooms and granulation

name: Oil Painting
promptFragment: traditional oil painting with layered glazes, visible impasto brushwork and deep painterly color

name: Pencil Sketch
promptFragment: graphite pencil drawing with confident contour lines, cross-hatching and subtle paper tooth

name: Pixel Art
promptFragment: hand-crafted pixel art with a limited palette, crisp clusters and controlled dithering

name: Vaporwave
promptFragment: vaporwave aesthetic, pastel neon gradients, retro digital artifacts, chrome accents and nostalgic geometry

name: Noir
promptFragment: classic film noir, high-contrast monochrome photography, oblique shadows and tense urban atmosphere

name: Pop Art
promptFragment: bold pop-art treatment with saturated primaries, halftone dots, graphic outlines and punchy repetition

name: Surreal
promptFragment: dreamlike surrealism with impossible spatial relationships, symbolic objects and uncanny photoreal detail

name: Photorealistic
promptFragment: photorealistic material detail, physically plausible optics, natural texture and true-to-life color response

name: Minimalist
promptFragment: minimalist visual language, essential forms, generous negative space and a disciplined reduced palette

name: Baroque
promptFragment: opulent Baroque composition, dramatic diagonals, ornate detail, theatrical movement and rich fabrics

name: Cyberpunk
promptFragment: dense cyberpunk worldbuilding, rain-slick surfaces, layered neon signage, advanced machinery and urban decay

name: Ukiyo-e
promptFragment: Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print, flowing contour lines, flat mineral colors and decorative patterning
